title: Psychotria puffii
taxonomy: Psychotria puffii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The genus Psychotria is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as wild coffee or Joe Pye weed, and are found in tropical and subtropical regions worldwide. Psychotria puffii is a relatively rare species, with limited information available on its classification and distribution. It is likely to be closely related to other Psychotria species within the Rubiaceae family, but further research is needed to confirm its exact taxonomic position.
